buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-medium
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-none
buttons.terminal: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-green-400 font-mono px-4 py-2 hover:border-green-400/50

cards.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

navigation.style: Crystal Glass - sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/40 border-b border-white/10

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Grid with heavy text on left, portrait on right, animated neural background.
elements: H1: 'AI Engineer & Data Scientist' (text-5xl to text-6xl+)
Subtitle: 'Building Agentic workflows and production-grade LLM systems.'
Portrait image with 'Tracing Beam' border effect.

sections.name: Experience Timeline
sections.layout: Vertical line with alternating or left-aligned nodes.
elements: Company Names: OsciraAI, Spacepepper Studio, PayU
Subtle hover lift on each timeline node.

sections.name: Featured Projects
elements: Architecture diagrams (ASCII art or simple SVG structures)

sections.name: Tech Stack
elements: Categories: AI/LLM, ML, DL, Data Science, Programming, Cloud

sections.name: Contact & Chatbot
sections.layout: Footer section with terminal command aesthetic + Floating AI Chatbot

images.description: Abstract neural network glowing lines for TSParticles fallback or hero overlay.
Placeholder portrait of Shuchi Shukla, modern professional woman.
Dark minimalist developer workspace for About section background.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React app with .js files (NOT .tsx). Ensure you only output .js files.
Use standard raw HTML+Tailwind for layout grids. Use Shadcn only for interactive bits (dialogs, inputs, forms).
Enforce extreme contrast. Backgrounds are pitch black (#000000) or very dark zinc (#050505 or #09090b).
Implement 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements as requested.
Use CSS Grid with subgrid where applicable, no centered symmetrical boring layouts. Asymmetry is key.
Ensure TSParticles neural network is implemented in the Hero section's background, using a very low opacity to not disrupt text contrast.
Create a fixed position AI Chatbot floating widget in the bottom right corner.
Include terminal-style blocks with JetBrains Mono for the Contact section.
In Tailwind config, set fonts to Cabinet Grotesk (sans), Outfit (body), JetBrains Mono (mono).
